meta.name: Churn Reason Analyzer
meta.description: Process cancellation survey responses and CRM notes to identify churn reasons, cluster patterns, and produce a monthly churn reason report.

parameters.content:
## 32 — Churn Reason Analyzer

**Required:**
- CHURN_SHEET_ID: columns date, customer_id, segment, reason_category, reason_text, mrr_lost, tenure_days
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** 1st of month at 10:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Analyze churn reasons and identify patterns. Focus on actionable insights. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 📉 Churn Analysis {{ $json.period }}: {{ $json.count }} churns, ${{ $json.total_mrr_lost }} MRR lost
